v2_delta: 2026-06-11T07:28Z — G-tokenizer green (PR #164 merged): tokenizer_receipt named; real token total recorded with the absorb decision. No other field changed.
basis: fp19-bench-20260611T024648Z (c03-qat receipted pace) + research/gpu-math-multiplier-table-v2-2026-06-11.json (survivor stack) + nc2-own-technique-contract.md (directed components) + research/v0-launch-gate.md (G-config row)

model.name: ember-v0
model.vocab_rule: MUST equal the frozen tokenizer's real vocab size from the TOKENIZER-FREEZE-V0 receipt; 32000 is the expected value, the receipt is binding

qat.scheme: int8-grid fake-quant STE on linear weights (fp19_bench shape)
qat.receipted_tax: 0.928x paced vs bf16 (fp19-bench c03-qat 18737.7 vs c03-bf16 20201.2)
qat.component_contract: #1 QAT — quantization-native pretrain, not post-hoc PTQ

excluded.fp8: receipted-negative: v2 table surviving 0.98 on Ada at this scale
excluded.ternary_v0: c01-scale variant only; v0 = c03-qat per fp19-envelope

objective.ce_impl: chunked/fused cross-entropy (Liger FLCE or cut-CE class) — the vocab-logit memory term does not shrink with model size; v2 table survivor

mtp_aux_heads.component_contract: #5 MTP — denser signal per token at a <=7.4B-token budget
mtp_aux_heads.fallback: if the MTP-head implementation fails its selftest, v0 launches CE-only and the deviation is RECEIPTED + the component re-enters at v0.1 — never silently dropped

optimizer.hidden_2d: Muon (momentum-orthogonalized, Newton-Schulz) — v2 table surviving 1.35 data-efficiency
optimizer.fallback: AdamW-everything if Muon impl fails selftest; deviation RECEIPTED, Muon re-enters at first checkpoint window

schedule.rationale: cheap intermediate checkpoints during the stable phase (fp-23/fp-24 probes ride them); v2 table survivor

data.tokenizer_receipt_rule: null = LAUNCH BLOCKED. Must name the committed TOKENIZER-FREEZE-V0 receipt (receipt_check PASS, assembly-sha pin match, reserved multimodal band verified, real token counts). The launch shim fail-closes on null.
data.token_shortfall_decision: real 6.974B vs compute-optimal 7.367B = -5.3%; ABSORBED at gate (PR #164 signoff): data-efficiency survivors cover it with margin, WSD permits receipted continuation, a top-up would re-open assembly + re-freeze the tokenizer
data.packing: sequence packing / no-pad batching REQUIRED at tokenization-shard time (v2 table survivor; effective-token waste at seq 1024 otherwise)

token_budget.rule: train to compute-optimal in the stable phase; WSD checkpoints allow over-train continuation as a separate receipted decision

throughput.compile: torch.compile (TorchInductor) on the train step; fallback eager if compile fails on the QAT graph — deviation RECEIPTED

excluded.machete_kernels: Hopper-only — not on the 4090 candidate set

governor.rule: FLOOR values pinned from fp19_bench; env layer may TIGHTEN, never loosen; fix-forward on a headroom violation is BANNED — kill and relaunch governed

runner.extension_needed: Muon split-optimizer, WSD schedule, chunked-CE, MTP aux heads, tokenized-corpus loader with packing (eng item; implement against THIS contract, choices are frozen here not in the impl)
runner.checkpoint_probes: fp-23 prereg attached; fp-24 (#139) fires on real checkpoints; fp-21b (#132) + fp-20c (#146) fire on the first sampling round
